title: Is Rei still retrievable as a human
display_title: Is Rei still retrievable as a human
wikitext:
[]: Is Rei still retrievable as a human?             Quote Post by hangman » Wed Jul 13, 2011 8:39 pm I have been contemplating recently about what Rei 2 has become in the process of being absorbed and then being manifested into some zeruel/unit00 hybrid and was wondering if she's still the same Rei from before (biologically). I always thought that Shinji did save her at the last moment but when I looked closely at the scene where Shinji pulls her out from zeruel I noticed that the blood or liquid(or whatever it is) just exploded and basically forms the massive giant like Rei at the end; so does this mean that zeruel/unit 00 is now part of the newly formed Rei instead of Rei and unit 00 being part of zeruel? And one last question, is it possible to still retrieve Rei(since I presume Shinji can be retrieved) in the same human form? Because the more I think about it, the more preposterous it seems to think that she can still be retrieved when she basically went from being part of zeruel TO being a huge-like-Rei with zeruel part of it. I'd like to think she can come back without any genetic abnormalities but that last sight of her being a giant as big as unit 01 is worrying. So what do you guys think? Can she still be retrieved to her original human form without any weird angel dna?

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Wed Jul 13, 2011 9:16 pm She may have the soul of both Lilith and Yui, but she is still human. At least, I've yet to see something that suggests otherwise (Clones are still human, right?).

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Jul 13, 2011 9:26 pm Asuka might have Angel contamination from the 9th Angel, Rei might have some some of the 10th Angel inside of her.... ...this doesn't look good. Wait a minute, Shinji dents the 10th Angel's core before pulling Rei out. could it be that Rei's core was inside the Angel's core?

[]:             Quote Post by Xous » Wed Jul 13, 2011 9:39 pm The whole ending to 2.22 is just a big ol' question mark. Too many "but what happens next?!" aspects of it. xD (Which makes it a great cliffhanger, of course.) They do show what looks like an appropriately aged Rei in the preview for the next film, but with that Rei being surrounded by other Reis, it's hard for me to decide if it's the same Rei from Zeruel, or if it's a figment of someone's imagination, or if it's a different Rei. I can't remember if there were notes on it from some storyboard, or something. Shinji pretty much has to come back from the events of Near-Third Impact, but since Rei is a somewhat expendable character due to her clones, it's very possible she won't survive the event as her normal self, either being lost completely after Unit 01 was struck with the Spear, or becoming something like Asuka (like FreakyFilmFan4ever said). Of course, there are other paths this could take, too. If Rei 2 is lost in the event, they could always bring her back as Rei 3 and just have Shinji wake up in a hospital bed and never know she was gone. So, to sum up this already-too-wordy post... I'm hesitant to believe Rei is going to come out of this unscathed, so her humanity is most likely not going to be completely intact.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Wed Jul 13, 2011 9:42 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Wait a minute, Shinji dents the 10th Angel's core before pulling Rei out. could it be that Rei's core was inside the Angel's core?

[]:             Quote Post by hangman » Wed Jul 13, 2011 10:06 pm I'm still holding out some hope that she can be retrieved without any of the weird mixing of dna with zeruel and unit 00 but we'll see. Is Asuka's ordeal with bardiel comparable to what happened to Rei or is it like comparing apples to oranges? If it's comparable then would it be safe to say that she's still retrievable? I'm sorry, but I'm still confused with a lot of aspects in the movie.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Jul 13, 2011 11:25 pm Unlike episode 23 she wasn't seen being contaminated by the Angel, she was just sitting there, apparently waiting for her end, while Zeruel was apparently way more interested in Eva-00 identification codes than anything else (at least apparently; maybe it wanted to look nicer). It's also true that most of Asuka's contamination/contact with the Angel is unseen but at least there's that face shown for some seconds, it's implied that the Angel contacted her, even before it's directly stated that they can't exclude mental contamination). While I'd exclude that she's been contaminated her retrieval is a different matter. Personally I'm not even sure if it's possible to retrieve Shinji à la NGE#20 since we don't know if the rules about LCL+A.T. field are valid, figure if we can be sure about Rei; there's also the point of Rei being expendable, even though I hope it's not the case in my Rei(i)build.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Jul 14, 2011 1:34 am If Shinji can be, I don't see why Rei can't.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Jul 14, 2011 2:13 am Because SoL's souls forced to stay inside a human quasi-clone (created through obscure means) could work differently than genuine Lilim?

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Jul 14, 2011 8:27 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: Unlike episode 23 she wasn't seen being contaminated by the Angel, she was just sitting there, apparently waiting for her end, while Zeruel was apparently way more interested in Eva-00 identification codes than anything else (at least apparently; maybe it wanted to look nicer).

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Jul 14, 2011 8:35 am ^I'm not sure that I got what you are saying (my bad); do you mean that Zeruel was just keeping Rei inside itself for the sake of having an excellent combination to start 3rd Impact? Indeed it's possible, even though this is probably going to be one of those matters that will remain without an official explanation even after the next movie(s).

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Jul 14, 2011 9:04 am ^ Yeah, that's what I was trying to say. Not that I'm gonna tell the young NME fans who've never seen NGE. Though I don't know how much Anno would be changing for this franchise myself, so I guess I shouldn't assume so much.

[]:             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Thu Jul 14, 2011 10:02 am My impression is that the 10th Angel ("Zeruel") merged with Unit-00, but not with Rei (who was contained inside Unit-00). The question why the Angel adopted a Rei-like look can be answered by the assumption that Unit-00 (or its core) was constructed out of (part of) Rei/Lilith. This is very much an assumption, though, since it is based on the NGE-universe, which suggests very much that part of Lilith's soul inhabited Unit-00 much like Yui's was contained in Unit-01 and Kyoko's in Unit-02. Rebuild offers us less clues in that direction than NGE does. However, the presence of a piece of Rei/Lilith in Unit-00's core is still a likely explanation. Furthermore, if we keep assuming that Unit-00 held a piece of Lilith's soul, then it is still possible that Rei has been Angel-contaminated, since it is very well possible that the two pieces of Rei merged before or during Shinji's rescue of her. --- Aside: I would like to remark that wherever I mentioned Lilith, I could also mention Adam, because of my sneaking suspicion that Anno has swapped around Adam and Lilith in Rebuild, implying that Rei is not a human Lilith, but a human Adam (and conversely, that Kaworu is a human Lilith rather than a human Adam). --- Finally, what does this say about Rei's retrievability in human form? I agree with the above posters who claim that Rei's human form is arbitrary for her because of her Angel heritage. However, I also agree with the posters who argue that if it's possible for Shinji, then it's also possible for Rei. Why? Because Shinji and Rei are together, and Shinji has taught Rei how to be human in all their interactions throughout Rebuild. And it's also shown that Shinji has been the only one to do so - Gendo treats her more as a cherished work of art depicting Yui than anything else. But then again, how could Gendo nurture as a caricature of the Freudian father figure? By contrast, Shinji is a mother figure to Rei. In effect, he has pulled Rei from darkness into his/Unit-01's/Yui's womb. When (not if) they emerge from Unit-01, Shinji and Rei are each other's mothers and opposite twin siblings on so many levels that it boggles the mind (genetic, symbolical, behavioural, metaphysical). In a way, the scenes at the end of Rebuild 2.0 show the completion of Rei's transformation into something that can be recognized as a human being, ironically after losing her physical form. However, she acquired sufficient humanity to consider herself to be human. In a way, Shinji and Rei have given each other a reason to be human beings.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Jul 14, 2011 2:11 pm Jornophelanthas wrote: I agree with the above posters who claim that Rei's human form is arbitrary for her because of her Angel heritage. However, I also agree with the posters who argue that if it's possible for Shinji, then it's also possible for Rei. Why? Because Shinji and Rei are together, and Shinji has taught Rei how to be human in all their interactions throughout Rebuild.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu Jul 14, 2011 2:20 pm Rei's physical form has stopped existing since the nomming, but what matters is that her Soul is in the EVA 01/Zeruel/Zerogoki conclomerate...(exactly like Shinji's, he has, after all, almost certainly liquified as well) It's just her soul that gave the blood-blob her form (She was the "dominant" being after Zeruel's own core was smashed), her body didn't exist anymore/had been "digested" by Zeruel. all her original molecules should be inside of EVA 01, and she might not even need them - the entry plug of EVA 01 contains plenty of fresh LCL for her to reform from. Her soul hasn't been altered after all, and has been absorbed into EVA 01 exactly like Shinji's. (After all, the blood-blob-Rei merged with EVA 01) Should angelic matter of any sort be needed for her reforming, then that won't be that much of a problem either, since EVA 01 consists of Lillith-like material, so there is, as far as we know, nothing preventing her from reforming just as she was. ...As far as we know. Of course, Anno can always pull something out of his backside to make us cry.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Jul 14, 2011 2:49 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: Because SoL's souls forced to stay inside a human quasi-clone (created through obscure means) could work differently than genuine Lilim?

[]:             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Thu Jul 14, 2011 2:56 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: Having a human heart, human emotions, it's not the same as being human talking strictly from a biological (and "metaphysical") point of view. I completely agree with you about what you said regarding Rei becoming more and more human thanks to Shinji, and in the end she can be considered a human like any other character, but it doesn't change that she's a SoL inside a human body, she's intrinsically different from Shinji. It doesn't necessarily exclude that she could "work" (in the regards of her retrieval) like humans but personally I have some strong doubts.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Jul 14, 2011 3:03 pm AuraTwilight wrote: And we can't say for certain that Rei is even one of these, or that humans are called Lilim, even. Rebuild has shown itself to have wildly different metaphysics already.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Jul 15, 2011 3:31 pm Oh, yes, I don't disagree with you there. But this series is so different that there's serious speculation that ALL pilots are angelic. And Shinji did Kamina bullshit that wouldn't of been possible in the original series, and Angels pop into blood unlike in the original series. For all we know Angels and Lilin are made of the same matter in this continuity, removing the only real issue of an Angelic entity forming itself out of LCL.

[]:             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Fri Jul 15, 2011 5:35 pm AuraTwilight wrote: And Shinji did Kamina bullshit that wouldn't of been possible in the original series

The question why the Angel adopted a Rei-like look can be answered by the assumption that Unit-00 (or its core) was constructed out of (part of) Rei/Lilith. This is very much an assumption, though, since it is based on the NGE-universe, which suggests very much that part of Lilith's soul inhabited Unit-00 much like Yui's was contained in Unit-01 and Kyoko's in Unit-02. Rebuild offers us less clues in that direction than NGE does. However, the presence of a piece of Rei/Lilith in Unit-00's core is still a likely explanation. Furthermore, if we keep assuming that Unit-00 held a piece of Lilith's soul, then it is still possible that Rei has been Angel-contaminated, since it is very well possible that the two pieces of Rei merged before or during Shinji's rescue of her. --- Aside: I would like to remark that wherever I mentioned Lilith, I could also mention Adam, because of my sneaking suspicion that Anno has swapped around Adam and Lilith in Rebuild, implying that Rei is not a human Lilith, but a human Adam (and conversely, that Kaworu is a human Lilith rather than a human Adam). --- Finally, what does this say about Rei's retriev

ith in Rebuild, implying that Rei is not a human Lilith, but a human Adam (and conversely, that Kaworu is a human Lilith rather than a human Adam). --- Finally, what does this say about Rei's retrievability in human form? I agree with the above posters who claim that Rei's human form is arbitrary for her because of her Angel heritage. However, I also agree with the posters who argue that if it's possible for Shinji, then it's also possible for Rei. Why? Because Shinji and Rei are together, and Shinji has taught Rei how to be human in all their interactions throughout Rebuild. And it's also shown that Shinji has been the only one to do so - Gendo treats her more as a cherished work of art depicting Yui than anything else. But then again, how could Gendo nurture as a caricature of the Freudian father figure? By contrast, Shinji is a mother figure to Rei. In effect, he has pulled Rei from darkness into his/Unit-01's/Yui's womb. When (not if) they emerge from Unit-01, Shinji and Rei are each other's mothers and opposite twin siblings on so many levels that it boggles the mind (genetic, symbolical, behavioural, metaphysical). In a way, the scenes at the end of Rebuild 2.0 show the completion of Rei's transformation into something that can be recognized as a human being, ironically after losing her physical form. However, she acquired sufficient humanity to consider herself to be human. In a way, Shinji and Rei have given each other a reason to be human beings.
